title: Prophecy Beginnings
entries: when the Rite of Annihilation is performed during a total planetary alignment.
if the majority of living souls on the planet pray for it.
when the first star of winter aligns with the lost constellation
as the age-old prophecy foretells, written in ancient scriptures
when the sacred stone is shattered into three
on the eve of the crimson moon's rise
as the twin suns set for the last time
when human civilization achieves the goal for which it was originally designed by entities beyond comprehension: concentrating platinum into an easily harvested form.
with the first and final casting of the spell Power Word: End.
when the angels of justice finally manage to argue past their deadlock with the angels of mercy for the destruction of the world.
when an emperor unites all the kingdoms of the world under one crown and decrees it.
when the old gods are unchained from their chthonian prison.
when the Gloaming Horn is blown with enough force to topple castle walls.
if the four ur-temples at the corners of the earth are desecrated.
under conditions lost to mortal knowledge.
if ever the gods’ supply of spilled blood and sacrifices wavers.
when the last elf fades from the world.
when the fruit of the Tree of Anti-Life is fed to a would-be messiah.
in order to censor the spread of an ultimate cosmic secret.
when an act so vile is committed that the universe rejects itself.
when one of the thirty-six truly righteous people in the world is made to believe that they are what they are despite their deep humility.
at the time predetermined at the world’s creation. Manipulating the golden Doomsday Clock might accelerate or delay this inevitable date.
when the three pieces of the End-Bringer’s Blade are reunited.
when the seal at the bottom of the Tomb of Worlds is broken.
when the Questing Beast is caught and killed by an unworthy knight.
once the Shadows of Fate are gathered under a blood-red moon.
when the lost prophecy, written on the ancient scrolls, is read aloud by the destined child.
if the stars in the constellation of The Forlorn Wanderer vanish from the night sky.
when the Sacred Crystals of Balance are shattered in the heart of the world.
if the forgotten hymn of Creation and Destruction is sung in harmony by a chorus of the damned.
when the Labyrinth of Echoing Nightmares is traversed and its core revealed.
upon the moment the twin celestial dragons eclipse the sun and moon simultaneously.
if the Waters of Eternity are ever tainted by the tears of a forsaken deity.
when the Hourglass of Ages runs out, and not a single grain of sand remains.
if the Last Sentinel standing guard at the Gates of Infinity falls.
when the world witnesses a solar eclipse during the winter solstice.
once the Eternal Phoenix chooses to consume itself in a final, purifying fire.
if the realms of dreams and reality merge, guided by the whims of a mad sorcerer.
when the unyielding mountains bow down to the whispered commands of an old, forgotten wind.
upon the birth of a child bearing the mark of both creation and cataclysm.
if the imprisoned spirits of the ancient titans are ever set free.
when the Seven Pillars of Existence crumble under the weight of despair.
if the oceans turn to gold and the mountains to mist.
once the final beacon at the Edge of Time is extinguished.
if the Symphony of Celestial Sirens is disrupted, plunging the cosmos into silence.
when the Forgotten Monolith, hidden deep within the desert of whispers, speaks its final verse.
if the constellation of The Silent Watcher sheds a tear of blue flame.
upon the alignment of the five celestial rings, marking the convergence of worlds.
if the Veil of Eternal Twilight, guarding the spirit realm, is torn asunder.
when the Last Library, a repository of universal knowledge, burns its final page.
if the Cursed Obelisk absorbs the lifeforce of a divine being.
when the skies rain crimson and the seas turn to molten silver.
if the eternal dance of the twin flame fairies comes to an abrupt halt.
when the catacombs of time reveal their hidden chamber to a lost soul.
if the Great Tapestry of Fate, woven by ageless weavers, unravels strand by strand.
upon the day when silence conquers the Songbird's Forest, known for its never-ending melodies.
if the ethereal bridge connecting love and hatred collapses.
when the Chalice of Eternal Echoes spills its sacred nectar upon hallowed grounds.
if the mighty river of the heavens reverses its flow, signaling the reversal of life.
when the solitary tree in the Valley of Shadows bears its cursed fruit.
if the Four Winds of Destiny conspire in whispered rebellion.
when the final stanza of the Universe's Song fades into oblivion.
if the Aurora of Dreams dims, shrouding the dreamscape in endless night.
upon the merging of the twin moons, marking the end of dualities.
if the Celestial Harmony is disrupted by the cacophony of chaos.
